comment: The app was good for a while. But the loss of a key feature has made it difficult to enjoy using. We could once select which album(s) on our phone we wanted to back up to photos, now everything is automatically uploaded and saved under "Camera" with pictures/vids you DIDN'T want saved now saved and its frustrating. Cause if you send them to trash it will delete them from your phone. I sent feedback about it and never got a reply. That one feature loss screwed this app up for me.
key sentence: The key words: album(s) backup, automatic upload, Camera, trash issue
the function of activity: Share photos or vedios with other.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Create link', 'description': 'Create a link to share.'}, {'name': 'Send in Photos', 'description': 'Send selected photos.'}, {'name': 'Create Album', 'description': 'Create a new album.'}, {'name': 'Share', 'description': 'Share selected photos.'}, {'name': 'News Feed', 'description': 'View or interact with a news feed.'}, {'name': 'WhatsApp', 'description': 'Interact with WhatsApp.'}, {'name': 'Your Story', 'description': 'Add content to your story.'}, {'name': 'Your groups', 'description': 'Interact with your groups.'}, {'name': 'Nearby BETA', 'description': 'Access nearby BETA feature.'}, {'name': 'Set as profile picture', 'description': 'Set selected item as profile picture.'}, {'name': 'Momo', 'description': 'Interact with Momo.'}, {'name': 'More', 'description': 'Access more options or features.'}]
